title: [ARCHIVED] OptiSodium
description: Lightweight mod collection for Minecraft focused on maximum performance and stability.
body:
![prewiew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150645b36eb91f887cff581d0bf97a248dc99f55.png)

## Status

This project is now archived.

Major updates are no longer planned. A new optimization-focused modpack, [Kernova](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kernova), is currently in development and will replace this project with a cleaner, more minimal, and more flexible foundation.

---

## Core Features

- Higher FPS compared to vanilla Minecraft
- Lower RAM usage in large worlds
- Faster startup and chunk rendering
- Pre-configured performance settings
- Clean Fabric-based optimization stack
- Stable and lightweight mod selection

---

## Supported Versions

`1.21.x • 1.20.x • 1.19.x`
